overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a nighttime walk along a foggy commercial street in Los Santos. The player approaches a strip mall featuring O'Sheas Barbershop and adjacent storefronts, with wet pavement reflecting streetlights and a misty atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy commercial street lined with palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down a misty street toward distant commercial lights

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining both sides of the street, silhouetted against the foggy night sky
illuminated street lamps casting light through the mist
low-rise commercial buildings with lit storefronts visible in the distance
single-story commercial building with illuminated signage barely visible through fog

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy Los Santos street at night, with the camera walking forward along wet asphalt. Palm trees line both sides of the road, and the distant glow of commercial storefronts pierces through the mist. The atmosphere is quiet and deserted, with artificial lighting creating dramatic shadows through the haze.

events.description: moving from open street onto sidewalk directly in front of storefronts

agents.ego_description: approaching the barbershop entrance along the sidewalk, passing under streetlights

entered.detail: metal security bars covering the storefront windows
red, white, and blue striped barber pole decoration near entrance
large potted plants flanking the store entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the open street onto the concrete sidewalk, approaching O'Sheas Barbershop. The storefront becomes clearly visible with its illuminated signage, security grilles, and distinctive barber pole. Palm trees recede into the background as the camera enters the commercial storefront zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: storefront entrance area with adjacent realty office

events.description: camera pans left toward adjacent Dalton City Realty storefront
yellow interaction marker appears above realty office doorway indicating game prompt

agents.ego_description: pausing briefly at the barbershop entrance then turning to approach the adjacent realty office

entered.detail: adjacent storefront with glass door and yellow interior lighting, featuring a real estate office
blue Pepsi vending machine or advertisement sign
yellow banner with black text reading 'TOYS FOR SALE'

segments.scene_description: The camera arrives directly in front of the barbershop entrance, then pans left toward the adjacent Dalton City Realty office. A yellow game interaction marker appears over the realty office doorway. The Pepsi sign and 'Toys For Sale' banner become visible as the barbershop recedes to the right, with the camera now focused on the realty office entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a desolate, foggy street toward the detailed storefronts of a commercial strip mall at night. It begins by walking along wet asphalt lined with palm trees, where the distant glow of shops pierces through a thick, moody haze. As the camera moves from the open road onto the concrete sidewalk, the mist clears to reveal the illuminated signage and security grilles of O'Sheas Barbershop. The scene then shifts focus as the camera arrives at the barbershop entrance and pans left, moving past a Pepsi sign and a Toys For Sale banner. Finally, the view settles on the entrance of the Dalton City Realty office, marked by a yellow interaction indicator.
